metadata.description: AI skills collection for Estonian SMBs — tourism, marketing, sales, operations, strategy, and workflows.

plugins.name: kasulik-ai-workflows
plugins.description: AI workspace setup, coaching, assistant creation, and continuous improvement. Commands: /alusta, /agendid, /wordpress, /toovood, /ulevaade, /tabel.

plugins.name: kasulik-ai-turism
plugins.description: AI skills for tourism businesses — strategy, marketing, sales, guest experience, and analytics. Estonian commands: /turism, /hooaeg, /arvustus, /kulastaja.

plugins.name: kasulik-ai-marketing-sales
plugins.description: Marketing & sales skills for SMBs — copywriting, SEO, email sequences, pricing, outreach, competitive intel, and brand voice. Estonian commands: /kontekst, /tekst, /meilid.

plugins.name: kasulik-ai-operations-support
plugins.description: Operations & support skills — customer responses, knowledge base articles, process documentation, and optimization. Estonian commands: /klient, /protsess.

plugins.name: kasulik-ai-strategy-leadership
plugins.description: Strategy & leadership skills — competitive analysis, financial statements, stakeholder communications, internal comms. Estonian commands: /aruanne, /plaan.
